meta.title: Dan Geer on Patching ICS Vulnerabilities
meta.description: Excerpt from Dan Geer's S4x18 Interview. Here he tackles the issues of how to respond (patching?, other?) if vulnerabilities are dense or sparse. Of course you should watch the whole interview on this channel.
